scenes.narration: Meet Ipkshita Singh – a dynamic legal professional consistently delivering top-tier solutions in corporate law.
scenes.caption: Ipkshita Singh: Legal Excellence Unveiled ✨

scenes.narration: A Christ University BBA LLB (Hons) graduate with a 3.51 CGPA, and stellar scores in XII (96%) and X (91.2%).
scenes.caption: Academically Brilliant: Top Scores! 🎓

scenes.narration: I've honed my expertise at India's leading law firms: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas and IndusLaw.
scenes.caption: Experienced at Top-Tier Firms 🏢

scenes.narration: Specializing in M&A, private equity, complex cross-border transactions, and corporate compliance.
scenes.caption: M&A, PE, Corporate Advisory Expert 📈

scenes.narration: From award-winning moot court victories to insightful legal publications, my commitment to law runs deep.
scenes.caption: Award-Winning & Published Author 🏆

scenes.narration: Ready to bring strategic legal thinking and meticulous execution to your next venture. Let's connect!
